headline: Crimson Tide Pods: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Crimson Tide Pods carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 65.45, led by DeVonta Smith, Alec Pierce, and Justin Herbert. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Jerry Jeudy at 49.1 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 10), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 5) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the verified WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI. It added 2 draft assets to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

On June 24, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Badland Banditos and acquired Chris Rodriguez, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2026 Round 1 (original roster 8) while sending Kenneth Walker, 2027 Round 3 (original roster 16). Chris Rodriguez is now on the current roster at 46.5 C-AVI and 64.9 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 2 draft assets to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are DeVonta Smith (87.5), Alec Pierce (75.1), and Justin Herbert (72.2).

sections.title: Recent Trade Impact
sections.body: On June 30, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Conquistadors, Northside Kings and acquired Alec Pierce, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 10), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 5) while sending Harold Fannin, Mike Evans. Alec Pierce is now the verified WR starter at 75.1 C-AVI and 78.5 D-AVI. It added 2 draft assets to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal. On June 24, Crimson Tide Pods traded with Badland Banditos and acquired Chris Rodriguez, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2026 Round 1 (original roster 8) while sending Kenneth Walker, 2027 Round 3 (original roster 16). Chris Rodriguez is now on the current roster at 46.5 C-AVI and 64.9 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jerry Jeudy is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 49.1. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, with 3 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 66.55.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
